name: agents_hub
description: Interact with the AG3NTS hub. Use action to pick an operation: download (fetch a file — requires: filename), verify (submit an answer — requires: task, answer_file), api_request (POST to /api/* — requires: path, optionally body or body_file).

filename.description: Name of the file to download (download only, e.g. "people.csv")

task.description: The task name to verify against (verify only, e.g. "people")

answer_file.description: Absolute path to the JSON file containing the answer data (verify only)

path.description: API path segment after /api/ (api_request only, e.g. "location")

body.description: Inline JSON body to send (api_request only, mutually exclusive with body_file)

body_file.description: Absolute path to a JSON file for the request body (api_request only, mutually exclusive with body)
